title: Crispy Vegetable Wrap
description: A gluten-free snack filled with crispy vegetables served in a crispy flatbread wrap.

ingredients.name: Vegetables
ingredients.notes: any combination of your favorite vegetables e.g., carrots, zucchini, bell peppers

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Slice the flatbread into two pieces.
Brush the flatbread with oil and sprinkle with seasonings.
Place the flatbread in the pan for 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
Add the vegetables to the pan and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until tender.
Add the crispy vegetable mix to the pan and stir to combine.
Assemble the wrap by placing the vegetable mixture onto one of the flatbread pieces.
Fold the flatbread in half to enclose the filling.
